briefdescription.para: < AES KAT parameters

listitem.para:
levels = 1
LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5
OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2

levels = 2
LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5
OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2

briefdescription.para: levels = 2 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2
levels = 1 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2
levels = 1 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2
levels = 2 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2
levels = 2 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2
levels = 1 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *P, const u32 *Q, const u32 *R, const u32 *S)
memberdef.name: XSecure_AesDecCmChecks

briefdescription.para: This function performs checks for AES DPA CM KAT output.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the data array of size 4 words.
is the pointer to the data array of size 4 words.
is the pointer to the data array of size 4 words.
is the pointer to the data array of size 4 words.

briefdescription.para: This function returns message to perform KAT.
This function returns AES key for KAT.
This function returns expected SHA3 hash for KAT.
This function returns modulus for RSA KAT.
This function returns public pre-calculated exponential (R^2 Mod N) value for RSA KAT.

listitem.para: RSA pre-calculated exponential (R^2 Mod N) value for KAT

briefdescription.para: This function returns data for RSA KAT.

listitem.para: Input data to be encrypted for RSA KAT

briefdescription.para: This function returns cipher text data for RSA KAT.

listitem.para: Expected cipher text for RSA KAT

briefdescription.para: This function returns private exponent for RSA KAT.
This function returns ECC public key to perform KAT.
This function returns ECC expected signature to perform KAT.
This function returns ECC private key to perform KAT.
This function returns ECC ephemeral key to perform KAT.

listitem.para: select ephemeral key as per the curve

briefdescription.para: This function performs known answer test(KAT) on AES engine to confirm DPA counter measures is working fine.

listitem.para: XSECURE_AES_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If AES state is mismatched
XSECURE_AESDPACM_KAT_CHECK1_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AESDPACM data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_AESDPACM_KAT_CHECK2_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AESDPACM data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_AESDPACM_KAT_CHECK3_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AESDPACM data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_AESDPACM_KAT_CHECK4_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AESDPACM data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_AESDPACM_KAT_CHECK5_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AESDPACM data not matched with expected data
Perform KAT on AES engine to know performance integrity
Zeroize the AES key storage register

briefdescription.para: This function performs decryption known answer test(KAT) on AES engine.

listitem.para: XSECURE_AES_KAT_BUSY - Error when AES is busy
XSECURE_AES_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when AES state is mismatched
XSECURE_AES_KAT_WRITE_KEY_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES key write fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_DECRYPT_INIT_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES decrypt init fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_UPDATE_AAD_FAILED_ERROR - Error when update AAD fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_GCM_TAG_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when GCM tag not matched with user provided tag
XSECURE_AES_KAT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when AES data not matched with expected data
Update input and output addresses to AES engine
Validate the decrypted data with expected data provided

briefdescription.para: This function performs encryption known answer test(KAT) on AES engine.

listitem.para: XSECURE_AES_KAT_BUSY - Error when AES is busy
XSECURE_AES_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when AES state is mismatched
XSECURE_AES_KAT_WRITE_KEY_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES key write fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_ENCRYPT_INIT_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES encrypt init fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_UPDATE_AAD_FAILED_ERROR - Error when update AAD fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_ENCRYPT_UPDATE_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES encrypt update fails
XSECURE_AES_KAT_ENCRYPT_FINAL_FAILED_ERROR - Error when AES encrypt final fails
XSECURE_KAT_GCM_TAG_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when GCM tag not matched with user provided tag
XSECURE_AES_KAT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when AES data not matched with expected data
Update input and output addresses to AES engine
Update output address to AES engine to store GCM Tag
Validate the encrypted data with expected data provided

briefdescription.para: This function performs known answer test(KAT) on SHA crypto engine.

listitem.para: XSECURE_SHA3_KAT_BUSY - Error when SHA3 is busy
XSECURE_SHA3_LAST_UPDATE_ERROR - Error when SHA3 last update fails
XSECURE_SHA3_KAT_FAILED_ERROR - Error when SHA3 hash not matched with expected hash
XSECURE_SHA3_PMC_DMA_UPDATE_ERROR - Error when DMA driver fails to update the data to SHA3
XSECURE_SHA3_FINISH_ERROR - Error when SHA3 finish fails
Configure SSS and start SHA-3 engine
Update SHA3 engine with input data
Update SHA3 engine with padded data if required and reads the hash
Validate the generated hash with the provided expected hash

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on RSA core.

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_KAT_INIT_ERROR - Error when RSA init fails
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_ENCRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
Validate the encrypted data with the expected data provided

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign verify known answer test(KAT) on ECC core.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary curve

listitem.para: XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_KAT_KEY_NOTVALID_ERROR - When elliptic key is invalid
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_KAT_INVLD_CRV_ERROR - Error when input is invalid

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign generate known answer test(KAT) on ECC core.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class

listitem.para: Generates signature for the provided hash and curve type and then perform KAT using that signature.

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC pairwise consistency test on ECC core.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve used for authentication

listitem.para: Get size as per the curve type
Generate signature for given Hash and curve type

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesDecryptKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesDecryptCmKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_AesEncryptKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaPublicEncryptKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Rsa Kat is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaPrivateDecryptKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Rsa Kat is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_EllipticSignGenerateKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

parameterdescription.para: Is a class of elliptic curve

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_EllipticSignVerifyKat server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

parameterdescription.para: Is a class of elliptic curve

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_ShaKat server API and and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the sha update/fnish is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If Cmd is NULL or invalid API ID is received.
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Call the respective API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This function performs private decrypt KAT on RSA core.

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data.
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data.
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
Validate the decrypted data with the expected data provided
Validate the decrypted data with the expected data provided

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on HMAC (SHA3-384).
This function performs known answer test(KAT) on SHA-2 crypto engine.
This function performs known answer test(KAT) on SHAKE crypto engine.
This function performs KAT on HSS SHA2 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If HSS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If HSS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on HSS SHAKE 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If HSS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If HSS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on LMS - SHA2 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If LMS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If LMS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on LMS SHAKE 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If LMS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If LMS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on SHA-384.
This function handler calls XSecure_TrngPreOperationalSelfTests server API and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Update KAT status in to RTC area

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_Sha2256Kat server API and and updates KAT status to XPLMI_RTCFG_PLM_KAT_ADDR address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the SHA2 KAT is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Run and update KAT status in to RTCA area

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Common IPI handler for versal devices
Common IPI handler for versal devices
Common IPI handler for versal devices
Common IPI handler for versal devices

briefdescription.para: This function performs pairwise consistency test for generated RSA key pair using OAEP encrypt and decrypt operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the SHA instance used during OAEP encoding for MGF
is SHA algorithm type used for MGF

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XSECURE_RSA_PWCT_MEM_CMP_FAILED_ERROR If RSA pwct comparison fails

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid

briefdescription.para: Message length of known answer test in bytes.
AAD size of known answer test in bytes.
IV size of known answer test in bytes.
Key size of known answer test in bytes.
Message length of known answer test in words.
RSA public exponent of known answer test.
Hash size of ECC P521 and SHA3 in bytes.
LMS Data Size.
HSS Signature Size.
LMS Signature Size.
LMS Data Size.
HSS Signature Size.
LMS Signature Size.
Maximum command length.
Multiplier to get DDR KAT mask.
Maximum supported DDR.
KAT mask.
